de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class VariableNameProposer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.VariableNameProposer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    InstantiationProposer

    public class VariableNameProposer
extends Object
implements InstantiationProposer
    Proposes names for variables (except program variables).

      Returns an instantiation proposal for the schema variable var.

    • Method Detail

      • getProposal

        public String getProposal(TacletApp app,
                          SchemaVariable var,
                          Services services,
                          Node undoAnchor,
                          ImmutableList<String> previousProposals)
        Returns an instantiation proposal for the schema variable var. Currently supports names for skolemterm SVs, variable SVs, and labels.
        Specified by:
        getProposal in interface InstantiationProposer
        Parameters:
        app - the taclet app
        var - the schema variable to be instantiated
        services - pointer to services object
        undoAnchor - node to be used as undo anchor
        previousProposals - a list of other proposals which should be taken into account (e.g. for name uniqueness), or null

      • getNewName

        public Name getNewName(Services services,
                       Name baseName)
        Warning: this method is buggy. It causes problems with proof reloading. Use the method TermBuilder.newName instead.

      • getNameProposalForSkolemTermVariable

        private String getNameProposalForSkolemTermVariable(TacletApp p_app,
                                                    SchemaVariable p_var,
                                                    Services services,
                                                    Node undoAnchor,
                                                    ImmutableList<String> previousProposals)
        Generates a proposal for the instantiation of the given term schema variable, which is declared as skolem term SV.

        Find a name for the variable p_var, based on the result of Taclet.getNameCorrespondent

      • getNameProposal

        public String getNameProposal(String basename,
                              Services services,
                              Node undoAnchor)

      • getNameProposalForVariableSV

        private String getNameProposalForVariableSV(TacletApp app,
                                            SchemaVariable var,
                                            TermServices services,
                                            ImmutableList<String> previousProposals)
        Generates a proposal for the instantiation of the given schema variable, which is a variable SV. The returned name is not necessarily globally unique, but that is not necessary for bound variables.

      • getNameProposalForLabel

        private String getNameProposalForLabel(TacletApp app,
                                       SchemaVariable var,
                                       Services services,
                                       Node undoAnchor,
                                       ImmutableList<String> previousProposals)
        Generates a proposal for the instantiation of the given schema variable, which is of sort label.
        Parameters:
        previousProposals -
